3233380.name: Center Station Simulator - Supporter Pack
3233380.description:
The Support Pack is a DLC for Center Station Simulator fans who wish to contribute to the funding and development of the game!

This pack offers a list of new buildable objects:
- A vending machine (Purchase resources and components with in-game currency)
- A water fountain (Decorative item)
- A statue to support them (Decorative item)

By purchasing this DLC, you unlock these new building objects. They are available in your build book.

Thank you for supporting CENTER STATION SIMULATOR! A big thank you to everyone for following the game's progress!
3233380.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 保加利亚语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语, 丹麦语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 芬兰语, 希腊语, 匈牙利语, 印度尼西亚语, 日语, 挪威语, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 瑞典语, 捷克语, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 越南语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
